Texas Minimum Wage 2026
Current rate, tipped employee rules, and what to do if you are underpaid in Texas.
Current minimum wage
$7.25/hr (federal minimum)
No state minimum wage higher than the federal rate has been passed in Texas.
Federal vs state
Federal rate applies ($7.25/hr)
Last verified
2025
How to use the Texas rate
The safest way to use this Texas page is to separate three questions: the statewide or federal floor, any local rate, and any tipped-worker credit. The rate shown here is $7....
